caption: The video features a person wearing a white shirt, gold suspenders, and a red bow tie, sitting in front of a microphone with headphones on. They have a distinctive hairstyle that is styled upwards and appears to be a wig. The individual is adjusting their hair with one hand while speaking into the microphone, suggesting they might be recording a podcast or participating in an interview. In the background, there is a mannequin dressed in a green dress with pink hair, and various items such as plants and framed pictures can be seen, indicating the setting might be a studio or a shop. The logo "Boss Talk 101" is visible in the corner, reinforcing the idea that this is part of a podcast series.
